final:
// // This module implements a 16-bit DRAM cell with write and read functionalities. However, it stores the input data only when the read enable signal is active, and outputs the stored data only when the write enable signal is active.
module dram_cell (  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire write_enable,  
    input wire read_enable,  
    input wire [15:0] data_in,  
    output reg [15:0] data_out  
);  
    reg [15:0] memory;  // 16-bit memory cell  

    always @(posedge clk) begin  
        if (write_enable) begin  
            memory <= data_in;  // Store input data on write enable  
        end  
        if (read_enable) begin  
            data_out <= memory;  // Output stored data on read enable  
        end  
    end  
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 16-bit DRAM cell with write and read functionalities. However, it stores the input data only when the read enable signal is active, and outputs the stored data only when the write enable signal is active.
